2026-04-07T12:32:18.203+05:30 INFO 16960 --- [quiz] [ionShutdownHook] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Closing JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' Hibernate: drop table if exists options cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists questions cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists quiz_attempts cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists quizzes cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade

test.name: testGetQuizById_NotFound()
test.output: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\pooja\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM warning: Sharing is only supported for boot loader classes because bootstrap classpath has been appended

test.name: testSaveAndFindQuiz()
test.output: Hibernate: insert into quizzes (description, time_limit_in_minutes, title, id) values (?, ?, ?, default)
